metric_name: Stratus XA400 price/performance vs IBM 4381 / HP 3000/68 / DEC VAX 11/782
metric_value: Stratus XA400: $446,350 / 125 perf / $3,571 per unit. IBM 4381: $707,897 / 100 / $7,079. HP 3000/68: $437,754 / 64 / $6,840. DEC VAX 11/782: $656,889 / 109 / $5,999. Stratus best on price/performance with FT included.
98.5% reliability standard means computerized manufacturing system goes down once every two weeks on statistical average — 'unthinkable' for modern manufacturing
